item.title: Oh, that's why...
item.description: MV edit: Just getting to MV doesn't net another trophy, just FYI. Post event edit 1: I could be wrong. It may have been implied that the other goodies were to be delivered **after** the event, not during. Who can say? Yet. :)
item.dc:creator: Yakeshinu

item.title: I don't care about upvotes.
item.description: But, at the same time, can we PLEASE spread this around more? She was put in an impossible position and made the best she was able to make of it. Let's do away with the mugshot-looking photo and give her the props she deserves.
item.dc:creator: JustSomeDoodWhoWantsToUseThisWebsiteToInteractWithFellowPeople

item.title: It's another unhinged XL Monday CeleryDump for the good and bad fools of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online fools
crikkey
mmm hmm
actually today was fine
haven't used an actual physical alarm clock in so long
no thanks
this has happened to me more than i care to admit
takes me back
accurate
nailed it
as is tradition
acceptable
i really don't like spiders but i've also saved like infinity of them
would be better if it was a hat wobble
that's a lot of space weed
just gotta jimmy it in there
and hair
that's all for me.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: Images of Note: General emoji
item.description:
can we just talk about the subreddit name for a bit.
yes
D U N E
I have a portion of my family that I don't know about because my Great Grandfather married a Catholic.
Everything is the right way up. This video is totally normal. http://twitch.abbii.gay
http://twitch.abbii.gay
Yes, I have a cat, and he is a ball of chaos. http://twitch.abbii.gay
Transport for Edinburgh being unusually based for once.
Eggs!
abigail.png
yip
fluf
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay Also I'm streem: http://twitch.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Please.
item.description: I've been posting faithfully on imgur for 8 years, the last few years have been absolutely brutal. Everyone has issues and there are too many site bugs to even list. I love imgur, but something has to change. The beta never worked right, ever and imgur was created to be an image sharing site yet even that most basic function feels broken and frustrating! Please, make it EASY on yourself and focus on site STABILITY!
item.dc:creator: BabyFarkMcGeeZax

item.title: Season 2: Day 1: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me
item.description: Brisket over Everything Smashed Dry Aged Beef Paty, Har-BQ Brisket Jam, American Cheese, Pickled Onion, Serrano Citrus Sauce From Champs Burgers, in Portland, Oregon. Previous Day Season 1 Day 365: https://imgur.com/gallery/x1p8mEi MESSAGE ME BURGER PICS OR YOUR FAVORITE BURGER SPOTS! @CrisprCAS Daily Tag

item.title: Congratulations, you've found an upvote ticket!
item.description: You can use this ticket to get an upvote from me on any post you'd like. Good for exactly 1 upvote. Just send me a link to the post you want me to upvote and a reference to this post. Have a nice day!
item.dc:creator: ASCNekura

item.dc:creator: Diablero666

item.title: The Secondst, Fourth Edition: Oops all Karlach.
item.description:
I haven't actually finished the game. Turns out I'm completely burnt out on DnD.
She has such amazing hair. I wish I had hair like that.
She's so lovable, and a big part of that is because she's genuine to herself.
I want to get strong enough that I can do something like this.
How'd that get in there. Oh well. I've tried to post this 4 times, but imgur was having server issues, as per usual.
Look at these two fluffy idiots. I love them so much.
item.dc:creator: villainousdescent

item.title: Digitool's Massive Meme Cleanse Part #216, 5th Cake Day edition
item.description:
Wait 5th‽
Time flies
Oh well, enjoy
Most Spanish speakers I know don't actually use ¡ as it is too much effort in casual speech
I mean, it works
Me Bitey And 2 points of Diddy Kong (I sleep) Also kinda Moist Baby But mostly Bitey
I should take mine when I'm done dumping
But it clearly isn't a pipe
Kinda want
I wish I spoke Viet
Ja dat ben ik dus
Opinions?
Such a good scene
Rat tax: Violet on top of Rose, don't think they fit together anymore, they used to fit 3 of them
item.dc:creator: DigiT00l
